notes: Michelin Vietnam 2026 ceremony is scheduled 2026-06-04; this is built from the 2025 edition. The official Michelin URL returned 403, so triangulated via Wikipedia + bestpricetravel.com + hafoodtours.com.

restaurants.raw_address: 61 Văn Miếu, Đống Đa, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: 1-star 2023/2024/2025 consistent. Chef Sam Tran's contemporary Vietnamese tasting menu concept.

restaurants.raw_address: 4B Yên Thế, Văn Miếu - Quốc Tử Giám, Ba Đình, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: 1-star 2023/2024/2025. Traditional Northern home-cooking in a refined French-colonial villa setting. Highly recommended for Japanese guests by Vietnam-resident Japanese media.

restaurants.raw_address: 11 Lê Phụng Hiểu, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội (inside Capella Hanoi)
restaurants.raw_notes: 1-star 2023/2024/2025. High-end teppanyaki, 8-seat counter inside Capella Hanoi.

restaurants.raw_address: 36B Đệ Tam, Tứ Liên, Tây Hồ, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: First Hanoi Green Star (2025). Farm-to-table sustainable Vietnamese using own garden ingredients. Note: street name needs verification — sources show variants 'Đệ Tam' vs 'Đệ Quai' — likely the former.

restaurants.raw_address: 98 Tô Ngọc Vân, Quảng An, Tây Hồ, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Bib Gourmand 2023/2024/2025. Modern Vietnamese in a designed space in expat-heavy Tay Ho.

restaurants.name_official: The East - The Taste Of Indochine
restaurants.raw_address: 5B Tống Duy Tân, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Bib Gourmand. Indochine-styled fine-ish dining concept on the Old Quarter's restaurant lane.

restaurants.raw_address: 4A Lê Thánh Tông, Phan Chu Trinh, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Bib Gourmand 2024/2025. Chef Mai with a polished take on Vietnamese home cooking inside a colonial-era setting.

restaurants.raw_address: 6B Đường Thành, Cửa Đông, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội
restaurants.raw_notes: Bib Gourmand. Iconic Hanoi cha ca specialist; popular with Japanese visitors. Per SKILL guidance: confirm fake-address-warning text on official site before publishing.

restaurants.raw_address: 11 Lê Phụng Hiểu, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội (inside Capella Hanoi)
restaurants.raw_notes: MICHELIN Selected. 7-course tasting menu showcasing Northern Vietnam; opera-house aesthetic murals inside Capella Hanoi.
MICHELIN Selected. Listed in 2025 guide. Address requires Phase-2 verification before final inclusion.
